input:
They had left their home town in support of their faith when the cause of Islam was weak and threatened on all sides. Now that Islam was strong and people were joining it in large numbers every day, it was not possible for any new Muslim to achieve that standard. However, people could struggle and work hard for their faith so that more people might come to know of it and accept it. When the Prophet had accepted the pledges of the men of Makkah to follow Islam, he met the Makkan women and accepted their pledges.
Source: Adil Salahi, Muhammad: Man and Prophet, Ch. 35: A Conquest of Hearts

output.scene_title: The Prophet Accepts the Pledges of Makkah Women
output.source_reference: Adil Salahi, Muhammad: Man and Prophet, Ch. 35: A Conquest of Hearts

characters.name: Prophet Muhammad (PBUH)
characters.appearance: Early 50s, medium build, dignified upright posture. Wearing a simple white thobe with a green cloak draped over shoulders, white turban with tail between shoulder blades. Simple leather sandals. Always shown from behind, face never visible. Distinguished by green cloak and subtle warm light.

characters.name: Anonymous Makkah Woman
characters.appearance: Late 30s, medium olive skin, modest build, gentle features. Long dark hair covered with a brown khimar, modest off-white thobe with intricate patterns, simple leather sandals. Subtle smile, warm eyes.

output.moral_lesson: Hard work and perseverance are key to spreading the message of Islam and making it stronger.
output.narrative_text: The Prophet met with the Makkah women and asked them to pledge their loyalty to Islam. They were eager to follow the new faith and promised to support their husbands and families in this decision.

compliance.notes: Prophet shown from behind, backlit by sunlight. Woman shown with full face, modest clothing and hair covering. Warm scene, appropriate for children.

output.image_prompt: Children's watercolor illustration. A serene 7th century Makkah courtyard with intricate stone patterns. A man in white thobe and green cloak, white turban, seen entirely from behind, standing near a group of women in modest clothing, brown khimar, off-white thobes. Women looking up with smiles, one hand on chest. Simple clay water jug in corner. Medium shot, eye level. Warm golden palette. No modern objects.
